message:
test(fcp-ratelimit): add comprehensive rate limiting unit tests (flywheel_connectors-oz1v)

Add 19 unit tests validating rate limiting behaviors:
- ThrottleViolation detection with all required fields
- Backpressure signals at 80%/95%/100% utilization
- Per-zone/connector/operation quota enforcement
- Burst handling with token bucket algorithm
- Concurrency limiter permit management
- Config integration with fcp-core types

All tests pass and clippy is clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
